ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Release year of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Total number of votes for the movie */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie in dollars */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie in dollars */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or slogan of the movie */,
  "poster_path" TEXT /* Path to the movie poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Drama, Comedy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date and time the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Optional review text provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was given */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the movie to their watchlist */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie added to the watchlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the movie was added to the watchlist */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the movie in the watchlist (e.g., to watch, watched) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie recommended to the user */,
  "recommended_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recommendation was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., seen, not seen) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the user regarding the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_wr" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "wr" REAL /* Weighted rating of the movie based on user reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_popularity" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)
